title: Australian Macaroni with Peppery Knead
description: A light, peppery, one-pot Australian macaroni pasta dish that's easy to make and vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for a further minute.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the Peppery Knead, tomato paste, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to the boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Add the macaroni to the saucepan and stir to combine. Cook for a further 8-10 minutes, or until the macaroni is al dente.
If using, stir in the grated cheddar until melted.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
Note: To make Peppery Knead, combine 2 tbsp of chopped fresh parsley, 1 tsp of grated ginger, and 1/2 tsp of black pepper in a bowl. Mix well to combine.
